variantSummaries.description: Current ranked LNS anchors plus sliding fallback windows.
Disable ranked anchors and use only deterministic sliding windows.
Rank repair windows from weak service marginal-value anchors plus sliding fallback.
Rank repair windows from residential headroom anchors plus sliding fallback.
Rank repair windows from road-frontier congestion anchors plus sliding fallback.
Use incumbent service and weak-residential anchors without the ranked feature groups.
Keep ranked anchors but constrain repair windows to 2x2.
Keep ranked anchors but expand repair windows to 4x4.
